description.en: Avian Ruvinar. Size Small or Medium (chosen at creation). Wilderfolk creature-type tag. Innate flight equal to walking speed, lost while wearing medium or heavy armor. Choose 3 of 6 optional traits.
You count as a Beast for effects that target Beasts (in addition to Humanoid). Spells and features that affect Beasts can affect you. **Base trait.**
You have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. You cannot use it while wearing medium or heavy armor. **Base trait.**
You ignore difficult terrain while flying and do not provoke opportunity attacks when you fly out of an enemy's reach. **Optional trait (choose 3).**
You can mimic sounds you have heard, including voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful Wisdom (Insight) check. **Optional trait (choose 3).**
You have Darkvision to a range of 60 feet. If you already have Darkvision, its range increases by 30 feet. **Optional trait (choose 3).**
Your talons are natural weapons dealing 1d6 slashing damage on an unarmed strike. On a hit against a creature your size or smaller you can grapple it. **Optional trait (choose 3).**
You gain proficiency in the Performance skill and can communicate simple ideas through birdsong to creatures that can hear you. **Optional trait (choose 3).**
You have advantage on Initiative rolls. **Optional trait (choose 3).**
